title: TranslationResult
description: The result returned from a call to translate a list of strings using IBM Watson Language Translator V3.

word_count.description: Number of words in the input text.

character_count.description: Number of characters in the input text.

detected_language.description: The language code of the source text if the source language was automatically detected. Omitted if source language was explicitly provided.

detected_language_confidence.description: A score between 0 and 1 indicating the confidence of source language detection. Present only when the service detects the source language automatically.

translations.description: List of translation outputs in UTF-8 encoding, corresponding to the input text entries.
